g.text: Networks: BMC, OAM/Provisioning, Storage Access, Storage Replication,
SDN Underlay, Internal API, Public API, Provider Network
BMC, OAM/Provisioning, Internal API (Vault), Public API (routed),
BMC, OAM/Provisioning, Storage Access, Storage Replication,
SDN Underlay, Internal API, Public API
BMC, OAM/Provisioning, Storage Access, Storage Replication,
SDN Underlay, Internal API, Public API, Provider Network
BMC = dedicated BMC port; OAM/Provisioning = native VLAN for PXE boot.
Several infra-node networks can be routed.
